name: The Amygdala Protocol : VR Horror Game

reviews.review_description:
Looks a fun game but I am
Unable to play this game ,I  start out very small about 4 foot high
 then when I click on hight I'm about 9 feet tall I could not untie my self from the chair.( so ended my game)
It looks good but untill size issue properly resoved I can't play a game I've purchased

The Amygdala Protocol already delivers strong psychological horror, even while still in development. The atmosphere is immersive, tense, in progress and carefully constructed. The hospital setting feels controlled and unsettling in a way that fits the theme perfectly. There are a few minor bugs, but the developers are responsive and clearly passionate about improving the experience. With continued polish and accessibility improvements, this has the potential to become a standout VR horror title.

As to playing this experience has been more than just a horror game for me, it feels like stepping into something carefully crafted with intention. Even while still in development, the atmosphere is incredibly powerful. The tension builds slowly, the environment feels unsettling, and the psychological weight of the experience lingers even after taking the headset off. It’s not just about the jumpscares, it’s about anticipation, vulnerability, and immersion.
Yes, there are minor bugs and areas that still need polishing, but that’s part of development. What truly stands out is the dedication of the team. The developers listen. They care. They are actively improving the experience and welcoming feedback from players. That kind of passion is rare and meaningful.

You can feel that this game isn’t rushed, it’s being shaped and that gives me a lot of confidence in where it’s heading.
With continued refinement, accessibility improvements, and the strong psychological foundation it already has, this has the potential to become something truly special in VR horror.

I’m grateful to be part of the journey while it’s still growing.
Looking forward to what’s next. ❤️🐺

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this incredible review — it truly means a lot to us.

We also deeply appreciate your patience with the early access bugs and your recognition of the work going into refinement. Feedback and support like yours genuinely help shape the future of the game.

We’re grateful to have you on this journey with us — and we’re excited to show you what’s coming next. ❤️

reviews.review_description: From the moment you step into its eerie, abandoned setting, the atmosphere is great, the sound design is particularly unsettling; distant noises, subtle environmental cues, and that constant feeling of being watched create a thick layer of dread. And several jump scares to boot.  There are some good setting customisations but feel a seated mode would be beneficial as it’s my preferred type of play. Also a clue mode would help as I got lost for ages, so some mechanism if you get stuck to help you out.  I realise this is early access and will update my review as and when it is updated and patched.

developer_response.body:
We appreciate your suggestions regarding a seated mode and a clue/help system. A seated option is definitely something we’re considering, especially to support different comfort preferences. As for the clue system, you’re absolutely right — getting stuck can break immersion, and we’re exploring ways to provide subtle guidance without reducing the tension.

Since the game is currently in Early Access, feedback like yours is incredibly valuable in shaping future updates. Thanks again for taking the time to share your thoughts — and we look forward to updating the experience!

reviews.review_description: This is pretty spooky horror game with great spooky visuals but I want to hands work better. Also there is Minor glitch here and there. Music is spooky too. Puzzles are great not too hard or easy. If updates brings some fixes this might come great game.

Jumped in with anticipation, as I had my eye on this game since I saw the trailers, its early access so I know the dev still aims to add more features, I would love some foot steps and just some crispier graphics, some of the text is too low, but the game does have a creepy atmosphere, I have had more than one jump scare, scary children are the worst in horror games, there is a lot of potential and keen to see the updates to the game.

I hope the continues to improve the game, it could be up there with the best horror games.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the detailed review! We really appreciate your feedback and have noted all the points you mentioned, including footsteps, text visibility, and graphics improvements.

A new update will be coming very soon, and many of these fixes are already in progress. We’re glad you enjoyed the creepy atmosphere and jump scares!

Feel free to join our community to stay updated on future updates and new features. Thanks again for your support!

reviews.review_description: No matter what I do I’m either short like a toddler or too tall to reach the doorknobs. WTF !?!?!? Unable to even play it.👎🏻👎🏻

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for review. the issue is fixed in this new update please check and let use know, thanks for trying

reviews.review_description: Me and my ma who is 62 yrs old  was very disappointed with this one took us 10 mins to beat the game i even pre-ordered it cause she really wanted to play it

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback, and we’re really sorry to hear that the experience felt too short. We truly appreciate you supporting the game with a pre-order.

The current version is only a preview/early release, and the full version of the game is still in development. It will include much more content, longer gameplay, and additional features that we hope you both will enjoy.

Your support and feedback mean a lot to us, and we hope you’ll give the full version a try when it releases. Thank you again for playing!

reviews.review_description: I just can't see very well an don't know,how to turn the lights on good game so far tho update i can't open any of the doors
Honestly something new, good story,i like good game

developer_response.body: we are happy to hear that, and we are constantly trying to improve it
